nasb.text: Now it happened after many days that the word of the Lord came to Elijah in the third year, saying, “Go, show yourself to Ahab, and I will send rain on the face of the earth.”

esv.text: After many days the word of the Lord came to Elijah, in the third year, saying, “Go, show yourself to Ahab, and I will send rain upon the earth.”

cnv.text: 過了許久，到第三年，耶和華的話臨到以利亞說：“你去在亞哈面前出現，我要降雨在地面上。”

ccb.text: 旱灾持续了三年。一天，耶和华吩咐以利亚说：“你去见亚哈。我要降雨在地上。”
